features: KILLS 99.9% OF BACTERIA - Remove 99.9% of bacteria with one wipe so you can be sure to stay germ free on-the-go
DERMATOLIGCALLY TESTED & HYPOALLERGENIC - All Wet Ones antibacterial wipes are dermatologically tested and hypoallergenic, making them safe and gentle for even the most sensitive skin
FRAGRANCE, ALCOHOL & PARABEN FREE - With no added dyes to help keep your hands moistursed and protected on-the-go

100% BIODEGRADABLE, PLASTIC-FREE WIPES - All of our wipes are made from PEFC certified renewable plant sourced fibres & are plastic-free making them a sustainable alternative without compromising on quality or conveience
MADE IN THE UK – Proudly manufactured in the UK for trusted quality & manufacturing standards

TRAVEL-FRIENDLY – Compact and convenient, our pocket wipes are the perfect companion for life’s little messes—whether it’s a sticky breakfast, lunchtime spill, or a muddy adventure in the park, they’re always within reach when you need them
description: Product Description Stay clean, refreshed, and protected on the go with our travel friendly antibacterial wipes. These non-sticky, plastic-free biodegradable wipes, made with a touch of aloe kill 99.9% of bacteria while being kind to sensitive skin thanks to its dermatologically tested, hypoallergenic formula. Ideal for quick cleanups on the go—whether you're traveling, commuting, or exploring the outdoors. Directions Peel back label & remove wipes, resealing to prevent moisture loss. Allow 5 minutes for 99.9% bacterial kill. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Keep out of reach of children. Do not flush. See more
